overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City. The camera moves from a street corner with NPCs near a futuristic car, through a narrow graffiti-covered alley, and emerges into a neon-lit intersection with pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with parked vehicle and NPCs under overpass

events.description: camera circles around the two women and the futuristic car

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling two women standing near a futuristic silver car, observing the neon-lit street corner

notable_agents.action: woman in red crop top standing with hands on hips near the car
woman in teal top and jeans leaning against the car

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure spanning across the street with support columns
tall skyscraper covered in bright pink and cyan neon advertisements and digital displays
sleek silver sports car with dark tinted windows and aerodynamic design
modern building facade with large windows and red neon accent lighting along the roof

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a neon-lit street corner at night beneath an elevated highway overpass. Two women stand near a futuristic silver sports car while the camera circles around them, capturing the vibrant pink and cyan neon billboards of the distant skyscrapers against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking area under overpass with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: moves away from the women and car into the darker alley area beneath the overpass
camera turns left to follow the narrow alley path lined with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking past the silver car and entering the narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls and parked taxis

entered.detail: vintage yellow taxi cab parked along the left wall under the overpass
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags, murals, and street art

segments.scene_description: Leaving the street corner behind, the camera enters a narrow parking area beneath the overpass. The space is dimly lit with a yellow taxi parked along graffiti-covered walls. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera moves deeper into the urban alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow graffiti-covered alley between tall buildings

events.description: passing red car with distinctive white skull graffiti painted on rear window
emerging from dark narrow passage into slightly brighter area with distant neon lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls on both sides, moving toward the light at the end

entered.detail: red compact car with white skull and crossbones painted on the rear window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a claustrophobic narrow alley between tall buildings, the walls covered in dense graffiti and street art. A red car with a distinctive skull painting is parked along the left wall. The passage is dark and enclosed, with only distant neon lights visible at the far end providing guidance.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley exit with outdoor seating and pink neon signage

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider street area with pink neon lighting and outdoor seating
camera turns right approaching the main street intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: emerging from the alley and walking past an outdoor seating area with people relaxing, heading toward the street crossing

notable_agents.action: person sitting on outdoor couch near a table with pink neon lighting

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading WAKY mounted on the building facade
sidewalk setup with couch, table, and pink neon lamp creating a lounge area
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a wider alleyway illuminated by a vibrant pink neon sign. People relax on outdoor furniture with neon lighting as the camera turns toward a busy intersection. The environment shifts from enclosed and dark to more open and vividly lit by artificial neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past the crosswalk from left to right
large commercial truck with glowing advertisements passes through the intersection
camera begins crossing the yellow crosswalk with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street with other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection
large commercial truck with digital advertisements on its sides

entered.detail: busy downtown intersection with multiple crosswalks, traffic lights, and tall surrounding buildings
massive vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches a busy downtown intersection with a yellow crosswalk. After waiting for a futuristic black sedan and a large commercial truck to pass, the camera crosses the street with a group of pedestrians. Tall buildings with massive digital billboards surround the intersection, creating a vibrant urban atmosphere typical of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant street corner through a claustrophobic urban corridor and finally into a bustling downtown intersection. It begins by circling two women beside a silver sports car beneath an elevated highway, where pink and cyan neon billboards glow against the dark sky. As the camera leaves the open corner, it moves into a dimly lit parking area and deeper into a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway, passing a red car with a skull painting while the environment becomes increasingly enclosed. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the darkness into a wider alley illuminated by a pink neon sign and people relaxing on outdoor furniture. Finally, the camera turns toward a busy intersection, waiting for a black sedan and a commercial truck to pass before crossing a yellow crosswalk amidst a crowd of pedestrians and towering digital billboards.
